description: This Java class defines a JPA entity named SupportingDocument, representing metadata for supporting documents associated with users and loan drafts in a business loan application. It includes fields for storing file information, identifiers, hash verification, storage details, and creation timestamp.

classes.name: SupportingDocument
classes.description: JPA entity class representing supporting document metadata, including file details, user association, and storage info.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID identifier of the supporting document.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID identifier of the supporting document.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with this document.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user associated with this document.

methods.name: getLoanDraftId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the related loan draft.

methods.name: setLoanDraftId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the related loan draft.

methods.name: getOriginalFilename
methods.description: Returns the original filename of the stored document.

methods.name: setOriginalFilename
methods.description: Sets the original filename of the document.

methods.name: getContentType
methods.description: Returns the MIME type of the stored document.

methods.name: setContentType
methods.description: Sets the MIME type of the document.

methods.name: getSizeBytes
methods.description: Returns the size of the stored file in bytes.

methods.name: setSizeBytes
methods.description: Sets the size in bytes of the stored file.

methods.name: getSha256Hex
methods.description: Returns the SHA-256 hash of the file content.

methods.name: setSha256Hex
methods.description: Sets the SHA-256 hash digest of the file.

methods.name: getStorageKey
methods.description: Returns the storage key referencing the stored file.

methods.name: setStorageKey
methods.description: Sets the storage key for the stored file.

methods.name: getMetadata
methods.description: Returns the JSON metadata associated with the document.

methods.name: setMetadata
methods.description: Sets the JSON metadata for the document.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the document was created.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the creation timestamp of the document.
